title: [ExportVerilog] Add an option to enforce wires for expressions with namehint

features.name: operation with sv.namehint attribute
features.description: Code should include an operation with sv.namehint attribute that gets lowered to a named wire declaration when spillWiresForNamehints option is enabled
features.snippet:
wire [4:0] v1;
assign v1 = a + a;

features.name: spillWiresForNamehints lowering option
features.description: Code should include a lowering option spillWiresForNamehints that forces wire spilling for expressions with namehints
